summary: Engage Gunderson to redraft the Halcyon DPA rather than redline in-house; ~USD 3,500 matter.
alternatives_considered: redline the DPA in-house, ask Halcyon to draft it, accept the existing addendum

summary: Approve Halcyon renewal at 120 seats on a new 2-year term, renewing July 2026; signature gated on the DPA / security review.
alternatives_considered: renew flat at 90 seats year to year, hold for a one-year term

summary: Adopt Linear (Standard plan, 40 seats) for engineering and ops issue tracking, billed monthly.
alternatives_considered: Jira, GitHub Projects, staying on a shared spreadsheet
